title: Why isnt Kaworu shown naked in the Green Sea
display_title: Why isnt Kaworu shown naked in the Green Sea
wikitext:
[]: Why isnt Kaworu shown naked in the Green Sea?             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Mar 07, 2009 7:59 pm Why isn’t Kaworu shown naked in the Green Sea? Was that whole scene in Shinji’s mind or was it a true representation of post-Instrumentality? I’m wondering why Kaworu isn’t naked like Rei and Shinji in the Green Sea. I would think that by instrumentality, everyone would have lost their individuality (physical things like clothes, bodies, and separate minds) that there would be no need for things like that. In fact, that scene wouldn’t even accurately represent instrumentality because I always imagined it as the whole human race as an entity without form, not just immaterial ‘bodies’ everywhere. I take it that GAINAX had to make a scene to symbolize this ‘oneness’ and the atmosphere of being one, so they drew Shinji and Rei as separate bodies. But naked bodies. It’s just that, Kaworu isn’t. Is he just a construct of Shinji’s mind, as he remembered people before everyone lost their form? So does Kaworu not really exist in physical world anymore* (death in ep 24) and so when he appears in Shinji’s mind, physical world Shinji sees his default shape? EoE after Third Impact everyone forms into a single being. I don’t know the significance behind Shinji appearing with Rei (maybe one reason could be because she was the instigator of this Instrumentality?) in this scene, but that would give a clue to Kaworu’s purpose and the reason for his earthly appearance. Maybe it’s because Rei (did she?) and everyone else became one but Kaworu…I don’t know. *This sort of has to do with Kaworu’s soul being in Adam, but that’s a topic that’s already been done. But why would Adam’s soul even have the imprint of Kaworu? I don’t think Kaworu would appear during instrumentality without being a part of Adam’s soul (maybe GNK was really GNR in disguise…? But then why the two separate bodies?) So if Kaworu’s identity was not imprinted in Adam’s soul, how could Kaworu show to Shinji in the Green Sea? What the heck is that Kaworu? An imprint? I know this doesn’t really matter but there had to have been a reason why Kaworu was drawn as on Earth and why Rei and Shinji were different than him. Please excuse the multiple deviations/or stupidity. I can't focus enough to write coherently now.

[]: Re: Why isnt Kaworu shown naked in the Green Sea?             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Mar 07, 2009 8:48 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: What the heck is that Kaworu? A Plot Device?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Mar 07, 2009 9:21 pm Adam's soul in Kaworu -> Kaworu dies -> soul ends up in Adam's body in Gendo's hand -> Gendo sticks hand in Rei -> Rei takes Gendo's forearm -> Rei merges with Lilith -> 2 souls (Lilith's and Adam's) are now in Lilith's original body. Why did Adam appear as Kaworu to Shinji? Probably because Shinji would recognize Kaworu and now something that looked like an Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Mar 07, 2009 9:24 pm I always figured it was because Instrumentality revolved around Lilith and her children. Adam was kind've just along for the ride. Got to watch, and make some commentary, but wasn't really participating.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Sat Mar 07, 2009 9:49 pm That seems like a secure idea to explain his appearance. So you think that really was Kaworu in EoE? I mean, I know his soul was in Lilith but his physical form appearing is suspicious.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Mar 08, 2009 2:38 am Technically, it was his soul. They're in a sort of shared dream world. None of what we see during Instrumentality physically exists. In the physical, real world, we have Giant Naked Rei holding our souls in an egg while the planet is covered in red/orange stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Mar 08, 2009 3:38 am Also, we only see a distant rear view of Kaworu naked in the shower scene in episode 24; closer shots show head or hand only. There is a cover-up going on here, something odd about vis anatomy that is not being shown directly to the audience. Gee, I wonder what that could be ?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Mar 08, 2009 4:12 am Keep in mind that the blue/green ocean is NOT instrumentality. By that point Shinji has already rejected it and GNR is falling apart, so it's likely more of a subconscious 'waiting area' where his soul resides until he reforms. Also, fanservice.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sun Mar 08, 2009 12:37 pm Kaworu's school uniform was part of his body. Case closed.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Mar 08, 2009 2:41 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Also, we only see a distant rear view of Kaworu naked in the shower scene in episode 24; closer shots show head or hand only. There is a cover-up going on here, something odd about vis anatomy that is not being shown directly to the audience. Gee, I wonder what that could be ?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Mar 09, 2009 5:11 pm Are those figures just merch or fanservice or does Gainax or someone actually have some kind of story for them? I heard something from a friend, nothing proven? that SEELE was going to merge human/Eva DNA with Angel DNA to make a new EVA series or something like that? Can someone give me some kind of clarification? :confused:

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Mar 09, 2009 5:22 pm >Are those figures just merch or fanservice Yes. >does Gainax or someone actually have some kind of story for them? Probably, as some slender justification for the above.

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Mon Mar 09, 2009 7:28 pm I sense that the real question here is how Kaworu was able to float down from the angel statue and across the sea in order to meet Shinji on the shore in the beginning of ep. 24 (without Shinji realizing anything). I don't really think he waded through water. Off topic but I have to know: What was Shinji doing in the beginning of Rebirth and EoE where he was all wet at the shore?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Mar 09, 2009 7:39 pm Oedipusfoot wrote: how Kaworu was able to float down from the angel statue and across the sea in order to meet Shinji on the shore in the beginning of ep. 24

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Mon Mar 09, 2009 7:46 pm Um... huh? He never leaves the statue in that scene. Also, it looks close enough he could plausibly jump back to the 'beach'.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Mar 09, 2009 11:16 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Gee, I wonder what that could be ?

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Mar 10, 2009 12:13 am I'm pretty sure it's one of those ideas I introduced virally years back, for which there is no confirmation/denial whatsoever. But such an utterly ineffectual suicide "attempt" fits his character well enough...

[]:             Quote Post by Oedipusfoot » Tue Mar 10, 2009 1:35 am I can see the shoes flyin'. Why then was Adam needed for Instrumentality if he could just sit back and enjoy the ride when things got going with Lilith? There was this episode where Gendo and Fuyutsuki were riding in a helicopter over the new lakes, and F. was saying how Seele was angry at the holdup in the Instrumentality plan (I think?), and Gendo said that Adam is growing well, and that the projects are all linked. I guess I really never understood what Adam would provide exactly. Why was he so important (the cornerstone of the Instrumentality project)?

[]:             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Mar 10, 2009 1:40 am Third Impact/Instrumentality is caused by the forbidden joining of Adam and Lilith. Adam would be needed, and I'm guessing he has to be slightly larger than an embryo.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 10, 2009 1:51 am Duke wrote: Adam would be needed, and I'm guessing he has to be slightly larger than an embryo.
